# SOLVED - DOWNLOAD FROM YOUTUBE - XDM 7.2.11 CHROME EXTENSION IS UPDATED TO MANIFEST V3 (#1162)

[SOLVED - DOWNLOAD FROM YOUTUBE - XDM 7.2.11 CHROME EXTENSION IS UPDATED TO MANIFEST V3](https://github.com/subhra74/xdm/issues/1162#top)

[joselmm](https://github.com/joselmm)
[on Oct 18, 2023](https://github.com/subhra74/xdm/issues/1162#issue-1950221519)
Hello everyone, I want to clarify this is not an official announcement from the developer "subhra74", this was made exclusively by me.
[I MADE THIS YOUTUBE VIDEO]([https://youtu.be/e07IEKFJuk0](https://youtu.be/e07IEKFJuk0)) : https://youtu.be/e07IEKFJuk0 SO YOU CAN SEE HOW TO DO IT
I UPDATED THE CHROME EXTENSION TO MANIFEST V3, but due to the cors issue, I also had to update the xdman.jr that is in the root folder of XDM,
XDM 7.2.11
YOU NEED TO DOWNLOAD my version of [xdman.jar](https://github.com/joselmm/xdm-2023/raw/main/xdman.jar) and replace the one in the root folder, (in linux it is in "/opt/xdman/", in windows is "C:\Program Files\XDM" or "C:\Program Files (x86)\XDM") (DON'T FORGET TO GO TO "File" --> "Exit" first).
https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/95531879/276328395-c58eadd1-fb95-495b-820f-7f2fcb3370e5.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..rAc4Cy6HGddztQn_aIz-OjHS0oCyaMlHOcFwwJExhLcYOU MUST ENABLE DEVELOPER MODE IN CHROME, IN EXTENSIONS,
https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/95531879/276328938-9727e8b6-ae3e-43ff-bdb3-a976a36e783f.jpg?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..UDFbvKuHaapR_xNCK5hxdbP2fTeAoD5cds0TM8WJ4Owhttps://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/95531879/276328806-67435c03-822a-4625-9166-574a5ec2b2a2.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..sPWDlEQi2wnMA0vsWYNzZYhKP8sRt4Rd6knpzkeV7oo[HERE IS THE EXTENSION](https://github.com/joselmm/xdm-2023/raw/main/xdm-extesion-manifest-v3.zip). YOU MUST UNZIP AND DRAG AND DROP THE "xdm-extesion-manifest-v3" FOLDER to CHROME EXTENSIONS YOU CAN UNZIP IT FOR EXAMPLE IN THE ROOT FOLDER (THUS YOU COULD NOT DELETE IT BY ACCIDENT) THEN IT MUST APPEAR LIKE THIS:
https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/95531879/277128386-ce9e18da-b704-4a80-af4c-bea475b3f80b.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..qKzicusVQ0OkCVfQ4lw7pIA0QitYm8QEMINU-FMGUNEALSO YOU CAN DOWNLOAD VIDEOS FROM YOUTUBE:

https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/95531879/276329057-01c45dc3-e82d-4b4c-976a-b547ffc03090.jpg?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..8HFShuGyl7aMXhe1tZJHU5o9YORFkjWiWcMR22k4eN8THIS IS MY VERSION OF xdman.jar:
